name: Swords to Plowshares
oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
design_notes: The most efficient creature removal in the game. Exile (not destroy) for just 1 white mana, with a drawback that gives the opponent life. Demonstrates white's design philosophy: powerful answers that come with a compensating benefit to the opponent. The exile clause prevents graveyard recursion, showing how removal quality varies.
